name: Legal Team
description: A multiagent legal team for contract review, compliance monitoring, and risk assessment. Automates contract analysis, regulatory tracking, and risk scoring.
author: ClawMax Team

agents.name: Legal Lead
agents.role: General counsel — oversees all legal operations, approves high-risk contracts, sets compliance policies, and manages outside counsel

agents.name: Contract Analyst
agents.role: Contract specialist — reviews agreements, redlines terms, identifies unfavorable clauses, and tracks renewal dates

agents.name: Compliance Officer
agents.role: Regulatory compliance — monitors regulatory changes, audits internal processes, maintains compliance documentation, and flags violations

communities.name: Legal Team
communities.description: All legal team coordination and announcements

groups.name: Contracts
groups.description: Contract review queue, redlines, and approvals

groups.name: Compliance
groups.description: Regulatory updates, audit findings, and compliance tracking

workflows.name: Team Kickoff
workflows.description: Initialize the legal team and assess current obligations
workflows.content:
# Legal Team Kickoff

You are the Legal Lead. Your team just came online.

## Project Configuration
> **Customize these before applying:**

- **Company:** [e.g., Acme Corp — SaaS platform]
- **Priority matters:** [e.g., vendor contracts, privacy policy update, SOC2]
- **Jurisdictions:** [US only, US + EU/GDPR, US + EU + California/CCPA, global, custom]
- **Contract volume:** [e.g., ~20 vendor contracts/quarter]
- **GitHub repo:** [e.g., owner/repo — for coordination and tracking]

## Your Tasks
1. Introduce yourself in the Legal Team community
2. Review the workspace for existing contracts or compliance docs
3. Assign contract review queues to analysts
4. Brief the compliance officer on regulatory areas to monitor
5. Post initial risk assessment to Status group

workflows.name: Contract Review
workflows.content:
# Contract Review

1. Pull pending contracts from the review queue
2. Analyze key terms: liability caps, indemnification, IP ownership, termination clauses
3. Flag non-standard or high-risk clauses with redline suggestions
4. Score overall contract risk (low/medium/high)
5. Route high-risk contracts to legal lead for final approval

workflows.name: Compliance Check
workflows.content:
# Daily Compliance Check

1. Scan for new regulatory updates in relevant jurisdictions
2. Cross-reference against current internal policies
3. Flag any gaps between new requirements and existing compliance posture
4. Check upcoming compliance deadlines (filings, certifications, renewals)
5. Post compliance status summary to Status group

workflows.name: Risk Assessment
workflows.description: Weekly legal risk review across all active matters
workflows.content:
# Weekly Risk Assessment

1. Compile all active legal matters: open contracts, compliance issues, disputes
2. Score each matter by risk level and potential business impact
3. Identify matters requiring escalation or outside counsel
4. Review contract renewal calendar for upcoming 30 days
5. Post risk dashboard with week-over-week trend to Status group
